title: halimium lasiocalycinum
intro: Halimium lasiocalycinum, also known as woolly rockrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Halimium lasiocalycinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice for topical applications. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into ointments, creams, or salves, allowing for easy application and absorption of its medicinal properties.
